description: An auto policy is coming up for renewal, and the system needs to generate and send the renewal offer.

nodes.task_description: Identify policies that are within the renewal window (e.g., 45 days before expiration).

expected_outcome.expected: The system generates a list of policies due for renewal.

nodes.task_description: For each policy, calculate the renewal premium based on any new rating factors.

expected_outcome.expected: The system recalculates the premium for the upcoming term.

nodes.task_description: Generate and send the renewal offer documents to the policyholder.

expected_outcome.expected: The system mails the complete renewal packet to the customer.
